highEffortItems.name: P6 SLA Dashboard (图组+表格+警告+long term)
highEffortItems.opinion: Largest single item. Includes 2 chart groups, filter, table with arrows, key issue warning, and long term. Verify if all features are Phase 1 must-haves.

highEffortItems.name: P4 SLA Dynamic Header Engine
highEffortItems.opinion: Header config is metadata-driven. 3 FE days still seems high but acceptable given dynamic product column extension requirement.

highEffortItems.name: P6 Dashboard long term部分
highEffortItems.opinion: Long term is new scope addition. 6 days for long term dashboard section. Ensure scope is well-defined before development.

highEffortItems.name: P3 Salary Upload (CC + Contract × 3 params × Before/After)
highEffortItems.opinion: 2.0 UI days for upload interface seems high. Standard upload component should suffice.

highEffortItems.name: Existing System Dashboard Optimization
highEffortItems.opinion: CSS styling changes (bold/enlarge numbers). 4 FE days remains overestimated. Should be 2-3 days max.

assessment.effortNote: +10 days vs old quote due to: long term, OT calculation, Actual sync, formula engine, PowerBI for Headcount
assessment.recommendation: ACCEPT - Rate reasonable, effort increase justified by new scope, discount significant. Monitor P6 SLA Dashboard (7.5d) and long term (6d) for scope creep.

decisions.title: Phase 1 scope confirmation — 4 feature decisions
decisions.description:
HOD confirmed Phase 1 feature scope:
1. Overview page comment hover display — NOT needed (excluded from BCSC scope)
2. Adjustment feature (动态调整页) — NOT needed (saves 2.0 PD from quotation)
3. PPC/MAT/VA dimension switch — NOT needed for Phase 1
4. Year filter (年份筛选) — Confirmed needed as filter dimension in multi-dimensional slicer

decisions.title: Define Phase 2 manual adjustment mechanism with permission control and change log notification
decisions.description: Phase 2 will include manual adjustment feature with: (1) permission control to restrict who can adjust data, (2) change log notification to track all adjustments. Deferred from Phase 1 scope.

details.title: Regression Test, UAT Defect Fix & Deployment Rehearsal; Verify Module Linkage
details.description: 回归测试、UAT 问题修复和部署演练；核对主页、详情页、动态调整页、数据切片器、产品龙虎榜的联动结果

quoteItems.task: 标准企业级框架搭建（前后端分离+用户/角色/权限管理）
产品维度数据权限体系
Dashboard核心接口改造（动态权限过滤）
主页核心卡片展示区（关键指标/产品汇总/状态/趋势/备注）
右下备注区域（按筛选条件展示备注）
详情页表格/统计/图表/备注所需接口
动态数据调整页面（维度选择+维护+联动）
全局数据筛选联动（年份/YTD/CF切换）
产品绩效自动化龙虎榜（Target对标+YTD偏差分析+可视化）
osch IDM系统集成（权限映射+触发器同步）
CI/CD自动化部署与环境搭建

highEffortItems.name: CI/CD 自动化部署与环境搭建
highEffortItems.opinion: CI/CD pipeline setup on existing server. 4 Ops days seems overestimated — standard Docker + Jenkins/GitLab CI setup should take 2-3 days max. Includes IDM network configuration which may justify partial addition.

highEffortItems.name: 主页卡片展示区
highEffortItems.opinion: Dashboard cards with key metrics, product summary, status colors, trend, and remarks. 2.5 days is slightly high for card display. Backend API can reuse existing data layer. Suggest 1.0 FE + 1.0 BE = 2.0 days.

highEffortItems.name: 产品龙虎榜
highEffortItems.opinion: Leaderboard with Target comparison and YTD variance analysis. 2.5 days is acceptable given chart visualization complexity, but can be optimized to 2.0 days if using existing chart components.

highEffortItems.name: 动态数据调整页
highEffortItems.opinion: New page for dimension selection and data maintenance with linkage. 2.0 days is reasonable but can be trimmed to 1.5 days since CRUD operations are standard.

highEffortItems.name: 详情页右下备注区域
highEffortItems.opinion: Remarks display area with filter support. 0.75 days for a conditional display component is slightly high. 0.5 days should suffice.

assessment.rateNote: CNY 2,308/day (45,000 / 19.5) is within market range (CNY 2,000-2,800). Slightly lower than HC Interaction rate (CNY 2,500/day).
assessment.effortNote: Total 19.5 person-days for Phase 1 scope. CI/CD (4d) overestimated. Development items mostly reasonable but several can be trimmed by 0.5-1.0 day each.
assessment.scopeCoverage: Quotation covers: SSO, framework, product mgmt, dashboard, detail page, dynamic adjustment, slicers, leaderboard, CI/CD. Missing: overview page tooltip/hover variance popup (shown in design HTML) — partially covered by dashboard cards but explicit hover interaction not quoted.
assessment.designGap: The TL1 design HTML includes a product card hover tooltip showing variance breakdown (MAT/Variable Cost analysis with YTD vs CF and YTD vs Target). This interactive tooltip is NOT explicitly quoted — it may be covered under '主页卡片' but needs clarification with BCSC.
assessment.recommendation: CONDITIONAL APPROVE — (1) Request HOD confirmation on quotation before contracting. (2) Clarify with BCSC whether the overview page hover tooltip (variance analysis popup) is included in '主页卡片' scope. (3) Negotiate CI/CD down from 4 to 2-3 days. (4) Consider making IDM optional (already marked 否) to save 1.0 day if not needed for Phase 1.
risks: Overview page tooltip/hover feature (in design) may not be covered in quotation — scope gap risk
CI/CD 4 days overestimated — potential 1-2 day overspend
IDM integration (1 day, optional) scope unclear — confirm if needed for Phase 1
